Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 55 c) Exhaust fans (wall mount ed) 5%of total population or (for each type, rating and capacity) 1 no. whichever is higher 9.3.11 Miscellaneous valves 10% of each type and (Specifically not covered above) size with minimum one (1) no. Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 56 9.4 ELECTRICAL SYSTEM (FOR EACH UNIT) Sl. No. Description Quantity 9.4.1 Generator and Auxiliaries 9.4.1.1 Generator i) Gaskets of all type (one set should include all types and sizes of gaskets for one generator and auxiliaries) 1 set ii) Insulating packer below slot wedges 50% of slot nos. iii) Ripple springs 50% iv) Liners (Insulating material below the retaining rings) 1 set v) Spacers (Insulating material below the retaining rings) 1 set vi) Generator bearings for Turbine End (TE) and Exciter End (EE) (complete with torous, intermediate pieces and all other fixing/ assembly material required to complete one TG unit except housing) 1 set vii) Oil guard rings spare for TE and EE bearings 1 set viii) Brush holder of each type (one set should include all types and sizes of brush holder for one generator exciter) (details of quantity) 1 set ix) Carbon brush 2 sets x) Slipring with brush 1 no. xi) Stator winding bars and connections (one set comprising of two bars of each variant) 1 set xii) Slot wedges 100% xiii) Hydrogen seals rings TE, EE each for phase and neutral side 2 sets xiv) Set of Teflon Hoses with connectors (for stator water cooling system) 50% of the no. of slots xv) Retaining rings (unmachined) 1 pair set 9.4.1.2 Brushless excitation system i) Relays of each type 1 no. ii) Electronic control card of each type 1 no. iii) Control transformer of each type/rating 1 set iv) Diode with fuses 25% of one unit v) Thyristors 100% of one unit 9.4.1.3 Gas system i) Diaphragm valve of each type 1 no. ii) Gas valves of each type and sizes (other than item no.c) 1 no. iii) Valves for H2 and CO2 manifolds 2 nos. iv) Safety valve
